description.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术宝石，支持可配置的切割形状、颜色和反射高光。适用于宝藏、魔法和UI图标。
description.en: Generates pixel art gemstones with configurable cut shape, color, and reflective highlights. Useful for treasure, magic, and UI icons.

triggers.zh-Hans: 宝石, 钻石, 珠宝, 切面, 宝藏, 魔法宝石
triggers.en: gem, gemstone, diamond, jewel, faceted, treasure

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 生成像素艺术宝石，用于道具图标、宝藏或魔法物品的UI显示。
exampleUsage.en: Generate pixel-art gemstones for item icons, treasure, or magical UI displays.
